title: corelib full Standard implementation
description: compiler/corelib ships complete Core and package surfaces with stubs removed, tier tags honored in api.json, and corelib-quality CI plus pckg publish on main. W0–W6 waves Done — HIR-free ISLE lowering (MethodDefinition, ForStatement, closure/capture, syscall, Core.Output, Core.Error), canonical ABI-v5 runtime (lifecycle, traps, TLS, Linux x86-64 debug/release kits), HIR/legacy retirement, and binary-provenance gates authoritative. Remaining ISLE gaps (LambdaExpression W4.2 carryover, TryExpression desugaring) tracked as CYB-173/174. Status: Substantially complete; W7 sign-off evidence in progress.
